response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software engineering, leadership, and innovation with 15+ years in the field. His background includes AI-agent infrastructure work, cloud-native development, and open-source contributions, aligning with core requirements. However, his focus leans toward general software engineering rather than specialized AI strategy, and his entrepreneurial ventures lack direct AI product scaling. His leadership in technical communities and workshops is a strong positive, but direct AI strategy experience is limited.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, Dlang, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong entrepreneurial background with open-source platform development (GISCollective) and leadership in technical communities
Proven ability to drive innovation and technical strategy in roles requiring cross-functional collaboration (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI strategy or cloud product leadership at scale (focus appears more generalist)
No advanced degrees (MS/PhD) in AI-related fields, though compensated by practical experience
Entrepreneurial ventures lack demonstrated AI-powered product scaling or commercial success
